title: populus tremula f. pilosa
intro: Populus tremula f. pilosa, also known as Downy Willow or Hairy Willow, is a variety of the trembling aspen tree that is native to Europe and Asia. It is a deciduous shrub or small tree that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Populus tremula f. pilosa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Populus tremula f. pilosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, or as a preventative measure to boost the immune system.
